# PR #4300 Review Screenshots

Generated from the PR #4300 branch (`9e051981aaccb0a41c078bb6de8ff5b97f06031b`) on 2026-06-13.

- `desktop-after-add-tab-free-count.png`: focused desktop tab-strip screenshot after clicking the new dashboard tab add button. This intentionally avoids the map canvas so the GitHub review embed highlights the dashboard-tabs UI.
- `desktop-after-add-tab-free-count-tabbar.png`: focused tab-strip screenshot after adding a tab.
- `mobile-tabs-initial.png`: focused mobile tab-strip placement, intentionally cropped away from the map canvas.
- `capture-summary.json`: Playwright capture metadata, including the measured enabled-panel count after adding a tab.
